_dataGap: public/templates/form_161_2025.pdf is not present. Acquire the official ITA blank PDF (טופס 161 — חישוב פריסת פיצויים), place at the templates path, then run `node scripts/build-field-map.mjs public/templates/form_161_2025.pdf templates/maps/161_2025.json` to overwrite this file with the auto-extracted field map. Until then, the route returns 503 TEMPLATE_MISSING and falls back to the positional draws defined in data/form161_2025_fields.json.
